# STACK.md — Kapruka Conversational Gifting Agent
## Generated by /start on 2026-06-14

## Full Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology | Version/Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Core Framework** | Next.js (App Router) | React 19, strict TypeScript mode |
| **Component Foundation** | Shadcn/UI | Radix UI primitives |
| **Styling Engine** | Tailwind CSS v4 | CSS-variables first architecture |
| **Icons Library** | Lucide React | Thin-line icons (`stroke-width: 1.5`) |
| **Animations** | Framer Motion + Lenis | Smooth scroll and interactive reveals |
| **Server-Side Integration** | @modelcontextprotocol/sdk | Server-to-Server SSE/HTTP connection |
| **AI Content & Assets** | Google Gen AI SDK (`google-genai`) | For Veo Video & Gemini Chat fallback |
| **Hosting & Staging** | Vercel | Global edge CDN, git branch preview URLs |

## Production Layer Decisions
- **Frontend Layer:** Next.js Server Components by default to optimize loading performance. Dynamic client components (`"use client"`) are used selectively for state-heavy UIs (chat, customizer, checkout accordions).
- **API & Backend Integration:** All MCP tool invocations are proxied server-side via Next.js Server Actions or API routes. This secures the MCP credentials, enforces Zod input validation, and avoids browser CORS issues.
- **Database & Session:** Zero local database. Product details, categories, and live order states are fetched in real-time from the Kapruka MCP. The guest shopping cart and session are persisted in the browser via `localStorage`.
- **Auth Layer:** None (Guest customer architecture only).
- **Environment Management:** Production variables configured in Vercel. Local secrets stored in `.env.local` (not committed).
- **CI/CD:** Automated builds, TypeScript validation, and linting on Vercel preview deployments.

## Environment Variables Required
```bash
# Google Gen AI SDK Credentials (Required for Chat and Google Veo)
GEMINI_API_KEY=""

# Optional GCP Credentials (if using Vertex AI endpoint for Veo instead of AI Studio)
GCP_PROJECT_ID=""
GCP_LOCATION="us-central1"
```

## Key Dependencies
- `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` (MCP client protocol)
- `google-genai` (Google Gen AI SDK for Veo/Gemini)
- `framer-motion` (interactive animations)
- `lenis` (smooth scroll engine)
- `lucide-react` (icon set)
- `zod` (runtime input validation schemas)
